q: How has the area changed in recent years?
examiner_note: Đây là câu hỏi về sự thay đổi theo thời gian (Changes over time). Bạn nên sử dụng thì hiện tại hoàn thành (Present Perfect) để mô tả những thay đổi kéo dài từ quá khứ đến hiện tại. Hãy tập trung vào các khía cạnh như cơ sở hạ tầng (infrastructure), dịch vụ (services), và mật độ dân cư (population density). Cụm từ như 'undergone a dramatic transformation', 'modernized', 'sprouted up' sẽ rất hữu ích.

band7.text: My local area has changed a lot lately. There have been many new apartment buildings and shopping malls built recently, making it much more crowded and busy. On the positive side, the roads have been improved, so traveling to the city center is much faster than before.
band7.note: Sử dụng đúng thì hiện tại hoàn thành. Nêu được cả hai mặt tích cực và tiêu cực của sự thay đổi. Từ vựng tự nhiên.

band8.text: Over the past few years, my neighborhood has undergone a dramatic transformation. It has shifted from a quiet residential suburb into a bustling commercial hub. Several high-rise complexes have sprouted up, providing more housing but also increasing traffic congestion. While I appreciate the new modern amenities, I sometimes miss the peace and quiet of the past.
band8.note: Sử dụng từ vựng nâng cao (undergone, transformation, commercial hub, sprouted up, traffic congestion, amenities). Cách dẫn đạt mạch lạc.

band9.text: In recent years, the local landscape has been fundamentally reshaped by rapid urbanization and infrastructure development. The most striking change is the sheer proliferation of contemporary high-rises and mixed-use developments which have redefined the skyline. While these advancements have certainly bolstered the local economy and enhanced public services, they’ve also introduced challenges such as increased pollution and a loss of traditional community character. It’s a fascinating, yet complex, evolution to witness.
band9.note: Sử dụng vốn từ vựng cực kỳ phong phú và học thuật (fundamentally reshaped, urbanization, striking, proliferation, contemporary, mixed-use, redefined, bolstered, evolution). Cách lập luận mang tính phản tư sâu sắc.

v.meaning: được tái định hình một cách cơ bản
v.example: The internet has fundamentally reshaped how we communicate with each other.
Rapid urbanization often leads to various social and environmental issues.

v.meaning: phát triển cơ sở hạ tầng
v.example: The government is prioritizing infrastructure development to attract foreign investment.

v.meaning: sự thay đổi đáng kinh ngạc/nổi bật
v.example: There has been a striking change in the climate over the last century.

v.meaning: sự bùng nổ/gia tăng nhanh chóng
v.example: The proliferation of smartphones has changed daily life forever.

v.meaning: phát triển đa chức năng (nhà ở + văn phòng + thương mại)
v.example: Mixed-use developments allow people to live, work, and shop in the same area.

v.meaning: vẽ lại đường chân trời (thay đổi diện mạo thành phố)
v.example: The completion of the new tower will redefine the city's skyline.
Lowering interest rates can help bolster the housing market.
Preserving the community character is a priority for many town councils.
I was lucky enough to witness the opening ceremony of the Olympics.

v.meaning: trải qua một sự biến đổi
v.example: The old industrial district has undergone a stunning transformation into a tech hub.
Singapore is one of the most important commercial hubs in Asia.
New cafes and restaurants are sprouting up all over the city.
Traffic congestion is a major cause of air pollution in urban areas.
The modern apartment comes with high-end amenities like a rooftop pool.
There has been a dramatic increase in the number of people working from home.
The company needs to modernize its computer systems to stay competitive.

v.meaning: sự cải thiện khu phố (đi kèm giá cả tăng)
v.example: Gentrification often changes the feel and demographic of a neighborhood.
The high population density makes land very expensive in the city center.
They are living on the 20th floor of a massive high-rise complex.
Reconstruction of the damaged bridge took over six months.
The old factory is scheduled for demolition next week.
They spent a lot of money to renovate their historic house.

v.meaning: sự mở rộng đô thị quá mức
v.example: Urban sprawl can lead to the loss of valuable agricultural land.
Strict laws are in place to protect the greenbelt from development.

v.meaning: dành riêng cho người đi bộ
v.example: The main shopping street was pedestrianized last year.

v.meaning: vùng ven dành cho người đi làm ở thành phố
v.example: Many families choose to live in the commuter belt for a quieter life.

v.meaning: thuộc về thủ phủ/thành phố lớn
v.example: The metropolitan area continues to attract new residents from rural parts.
The expansion of the airport has increased the noise levels for neighbors.
The Eiffel Tower is the most famous landmark in Paris.

v.meaning: bảo tồn di tích lịch sử
v.example: Historic preservation is important for maintaining a city's unique identity.
I'm not a big fan of the glass and steel of modern architecture.

v.meaning: rừng bê tông (thành phố ngột ngạt)
v.example: Living in a concrete jungle can be very stressful for nature lovers.
We took the more scenic route through the forest.

v.meaning: nhà ở giá rẻ/vừa túi tiền
v.example: There is a desperate need for more affordable housing in the city.
The main station is a major transport hub for the entire region.
Noise pollution from the nearby highway is a constant problem.
Air quality is usually better after a heavy rain shower.
Overcrowding is a major issue on commuter trains during peak hours.
He grew up in a very friendly neighborhood where everyone knew each other.
Each neighborhood has its own unique character and identity.
If the buildings are not maintained, they will eventually deteriorate.
Local shops started to flourish again after the street was renovated.
Economic opportunities are the main driver of internal migration.
The area's character was changed forever by rapid industrialization.
The volcanic landscape of Hawaii is unlike anywhere else on Earth.
Many people move to the suburbs to have more space for their families.
The commercialization of traditional festivals can take away their original meaning.
The architecture remains a lasting legacy of the colonial period.
The evolution of the city from a small port to a global hub is fascinating.
